message:
fix(web): guard against undefined amino acid palette in TranslationVisualizer

When an amino acid code is not in the theme (e.g., 'X' for unknown),
theme.aminoAcids[aa] returns undefined. This caused a TypeError when
accessing palette.bg and palette.fg. Added nullish coalescing fallback
to use theme background/text colors.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
